src/main/resources/db/migration/V1__reli._comment: Both flags enabled: migration must emit BOTH outbox_event AND processed_event tables.
contains: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS outbox_event
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS processed_event

src/main/java/com/test/shared/infrastruc._comment: outbox: true + broker: kafka → Kafka relay variant. No purge (no outboxRetentionDays).
consumerIdempotency: true → IdempotencyGuard must be generated. No purge (no processedEventRetentionDays).
ProcessedEventJpa must be generated with composite PK.

src/main/java/com/test/catalog/applicati._comment: outbox enabled: DomainEventHandler must use @EventListener and OutboxEventJpaRepository.

src/main/java/com/test/inventory/infrast._comment: consumerIdempotency: true → KafkaListener must inject and call IdempotencyGuard.tryRecord.
